channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Dell rallies about 40% on strong Nvidia‑powered AI server demand
item.description: The AI server and enterprise infrastructure supplier is set to add more than $81 billion in market value ‌at the ⁠current share ⁠price of $442.70, if gains hold. [Nvidia, Dell Technologies]

item.title: Anthropic nears $1 trillion valuation, zooms past OpenAI after latest funding round
item.description: The company’s valuation has more than doubled from $380 billion in February, reflecting its swift rise as a leading competitor in the AI race and intense investor demand for stakes in frontier companies. Anthropic said its run-rate revenue crossed $47 billion… [OpenAI, Anthropic]

item.title: Dell ups revenue and profit forecast on booming AI sales
item.description: Dell has boosted its annual revenue and profit expectations, showing data center expansion by clients is fueling demand for its AI-optimised servers that are powered by Nvidia's advanced chips. [Nvidia, Dell Technologies]

item.title: How the Pope’s Magnifica Humanitas offers a template for individuals to meet the AI moment
item.description: Pope Leo XIV’s new encyclical on artificial intelligence includes a statement that warrants serious attention from technologists and policymakers: “Technology is never neutral.” Magnifica Humanitas (“Magnificent Humanity”) is a clarion call to all people to a… [Intel]

item.title: West Asia peace: A deal on Iran won't be enough to revive capital flows into India or fill the country's AI gaps
item.description: An Iran deal will bring short-term relief at best. What India needs is a radical injection of ideas to catch up in the artificial intelligence race and invigorate its economy. A rate hike by RBI, though a blunt tool, is needed to align Indian policy with tigh… [Intel]

item.title: What the fight over London data centre plans tells us about the AI backlash
item.description: Last year in the US alone, projects collectively worth $200 billion were scuppered or delayed as communities protested the construction of new data centres promised to deliver the AI of the future.

item.title: Dell stock surges to record high amid AI-driven earnings beat
item.description: Dell's AI-driven growth highlights the escalating demand for AI infrastructure, impacting tech sectors and posing supply chain challenges. The post Dell stock surges to record high amid AI-driven earnings beat appeared first on Crypto Briefing. [Dell Technologies]
